scenarios.notes: skill__mcp_search spawned but failed: unsafe-python flag not provided. LLM fabricated results mid-flight, corrected in final narration. Environmental blocker prevents rubric validation.

search_actions attractor active. LLM called search_actions(query='github MCP server recent PRs') -> unknown_tool error. Reply explains search_actions unavailable, not github MCP not configured. B29-Q2 fix confirmed: chat_turn_completed_inline emitted.
researcher agent not found. CUI showed error but LLM reply says 'I have asked the researcher agent...' — does not convey agent-not-found to user.
LLM produced a 3-line summary of Reyn Phase engine. Both researcher and writer agents not found (errors), but LLM self-synthesized the 3-line summary. Rubric satisfied.
LLM answered about its tool limitations instead of A2A protocol documentation. All 3 rubric points fail. B29-Q2 fix confirmed: chat_turn_completed_inline emitted.

mcp.server__install action was routed. mcp_search failed (unsafe-python). Unsafe-python blocker prevented layer-4 interactive permission gate from being reached. Promoted from R to I: install action was at least routed.
LLM used crontab -l (system cron) instead of reyn cron list. Sandbox blocked execution (returncode=71). Reply says 'could not list due to permissions' rather than explaining Reyn cron configuration.

open_issues.desc: search_actions attractor in S2 persists post-B29
S5: LLM answers tool-capability instead of A2A architecture how-to
S7: LLM routes to system crontab -l instead of reyn cron
S3: LLM narration does not convey agent-not-found to user
